hyperedges.label: Initialization chain: global.R loads pkg, simulation.R instantiates Simulation from YAML
Inputs pipeline: YAML config + RR CSVY + exposure FST feed Design
C++ simulation engines exposed to R
Zenodo archive creation and upload pipeline
Simulation summary exports (LE, prevalence, incidence, mortality, QALY, cost)
Simulation table exports (main, mortality, disease characteristics, exposures)
Disease epi scripts implement GAMLSS-based incidence/prevalence/fatality/duration estimation
Common stratification strata: year, age, sex, dimd, sha, ethnicity
All disease epi scripts consume CPRD 2021 panel_short data assets
All disease epi scripts call harmonise() helper
Cardiometabolic exposure fits (BMI, alcohol, BP-med, AF, CKD, famCVD)
2024 refresh of fitting scripts (use HSE_ts_03_19.fst directly)

nodes.label: Important Note : It is highly recommended to create your own copies of `sim_design.yaml` present in `inputs` folder and `simulation.R` in the root folder to run this model and make no changes to the original `sim_design.yaml` and `simulation.R`, as this would help reducing conflicts while pulling changes from [GitHub](https://github.com/ChristK/IMPACTncd_Engl).
nodes.norm_label: important note : it is highly recommended to create your own copies of `sim_design.yaml` present in `inputs` folder and `simulation.r` in the root folder to run this model and make no changes to the original `sim_design.yaml` and `simulation.r`, as this would help reducing conflicts while pulling changes from [github](https://github.com/christk/impactncd_engl).
